query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.organizationId, o.id as orgId, o.name as orgName FROM users u LEFT JOIN organizations o ON u.organizationId = o.id WHERE u.id = 20220001;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zhFTwZdMBa685Cr.4d37142b48ab --database FiS5WF2NaftJTm6fu3BYQb --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.organizationId, o.id as orgId, o.name as orgName FROM users u LEFT JOIN organizations o ON u.organizationId = o.id WHERE u.id = 20220001;
